reviews.review_description: In this game they have horror a giant forest map to road and they have fun stuff where you can bounce really high on trampolines
I met the owner before I got the game in gtag and he gave me mod it's a very nice community and the owner nonamegt is very nice I definitely recommend getting this amazing game
I have gotten banned ￼for zero reasons first, when I’d join the game a moderator banned me for no reason’s please do not get this game very toxic people on this game and this is a one star

developer_response.body: i am very sorry on what you experienced. i will try to remove moderator from people that do stuff like this

reviews.review_title: How do people say this is good
reviews.review_description: I literally got ear damage because of this game and now I have a massive headache like wtf and what’s more it’s just a copy of gorilla tag no efforts put into it

developer_response.body: that feature is now removed so if you want to retry the game you can

reviews.review_description: Bro I was banned for no reason at all and can I please have mod it’s my dream my name is frosty by the way
The game is super good and the owner is nice  and the game has a good community and I got mod right when I got the game and I’m very nice my name in the game is notband
Everytime I try to play it I either get kicked or something else like today I just got banned for no reason they need new mods

There was to moderators in the game when I came on and I joined a public lobby and they said leave so I did and then I joined another public and they were there again so one guy said he banned me and when I came back on I was banned for no reason they said I was player tracking however the game is really good and fun
This game is one of my favorite games on VR I rated five star￼ And if the maker of this game Sees￼Then I want to Play his game with him￼￼
